performance.summary: The page has significant performance issues, with a score of 46. The Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) and Total Blocking Time (TBT) are the primary contributors to this score.

findings.impact: Slow page loads can lead to higher bounce rates and negatively impact user experience.
findings.recommendation: Optimize images, reduce render-blocking resources, and leverage browser caching to improve LCP.

findings.impact: Excessive blocking time can delay page interactivity and hinder user engagement.
findings.recommendation: Minify and compress CSS, JavaScript, and HTML files to reduce blocking time.

findings.evidence: Document request latency: estimated savings of 210 ms (mobile) / 190 ms (desktop)
findings.impact: Slow document request latency can increase page load times and affect search engine rankings.
findings.recommendation: Enable text compression, avoid redirects, and ensure a fast server response to reduce latency.

findings.impact: Excessive DOM size can increase memory usage and slow down page rendering.
findings.recommendation: Optimize DOM size by removing unnecessary elements, using a virtual DOM, or implementing lazy loading.

accessibility.summary: Automated tooling detects roughly a third of WCAG failures; manual review is required for the categories listed in `manual_review_required`. The site scored 83 on desktop and 87 on mobile, with issues found in ARIA attributes and hidden focusable elements.

findings.evidence: The `[aria-hidden="true"]` element contains focusable descendents, affecting 5 elements on the page.
findings.impact: Screen reader users may not be able to access interactive elements within the hidden section, affecting their ability to navigate the site.
findings.recommendation: Remove focusable elements from within the `[aria-hidden="true"]` section or adjust the ARIA attributes to ensure proper accessibility.

seo.summary: The website has a perfect SEO score, with no issues detected in crawlability, indexability, metadata, mobile usability, or structured data.

findings.evidence: The website has a valid robots.txt file, allowing search engines to crawl the site.
findings.impact: This ensures that search engines can discover and index the website's content.
findings.recommendation: No action needed, as the website already has a valid robots.txt file.

findings.evidence: The website has a valid canonical link, specifying the preferred version of the page.
findings.impact: This helps search engines understand the website's structure and avoid duplicate content issues.
findings.recommendation: No action needed, as the website already has a valid canonical link.

findings.evidence: The website has a descriptive title and meta description, providing context for search engines and users.
findings.impact: This improves the website's visibility in search results and helps users understand the content.
findings.recommendation: No action needed, as the website already has descriptive metadata.

findings.evidence: The website is mobile-friendly, with a responsive design and proper viewport settings.
findings.impact: This ensures a good user experience for mobile users and helps with search engine rankings.
findings.recommendation: No action needed, as the website is already mobile-friendly.

findings.evidence: The website has valid hreflang links, specifying the language and region for each page.
findings.impact: This helps search engines understand the website's content and provide relevant results for users.
findings.recommendation: No action needed, as the website already has valid hreflang links.
